case_title: IGOR KRYAN VS. URBAN DICTIONARY LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-06-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN DICTIONARY LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KRYAN, IGOR AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN DICTIONARY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IGOR KRYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT URBAM DICTIONARY LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY AARON PECKMAN, CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN DICTIONARY LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT URBAN DICTIONARY LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT URBAN DICTIONARY LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
